subject: English
chapter: The Beam of Light That Lit the Path for Women in Indian Science

activities_projects.title: Critical Reading and Concept Mapping
activities_projects.objective: Develop deep comprehension of the chapter through analysis and visual representation
steps: Read the chapter carefully and identify major ideas and themes
Create a concept map connecting Bibha Chowdhuri’s life, challenges, and achievements
Show how these elements influenced Indian science
Present the concept map and explain the relationships between ideas
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop analytical reading and information organisation skills
activities_projects.evaluation: Depth of analysis and clarity of concept map (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Scientific Contribution Investigation
activities_projects.objective: Analyse Bibha Chowdhuri’s scientific work and its significance
steps: Research Bibha Chowdhuri’s scientific discoveries
Identify the impact of her work in the field of physics
Compare her work with another contemporary scientist
Prepare a short analytical report explaining the importance of her research
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand the scientific significance of historical discoveries
activities_projects.evaluation: Research depth and analytical explanation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Debate on Gender Equality in Science
activities_projects.objective: Encourage critical thinking about gender issues in scientific fields
steps: Divide the class into two groups
Research the opportunities and challenges faced by women scientists
Prepare arguments supporting equal opportunities in STEM
Conduct a structured classroom debate
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop argumentation and critical reasoning skills
activities_projects.evaluation: Quality of arguments and participation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Comparative Scientist Study
activities_projects.objective: Analyse similarities and differences between scientists
steps: Select another famous woman scientist
Research her achievements and background
Compare her journey with Bibha Chowdhuri’s career
Write a comparative analysis highlighting similarities and differences
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students strengthen analytical and comparative thinking skills
activities_projects.evaluation: Quality of comparison and written analysis (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Historical Context Analysis
activities_projects.objective: Understand the historical and social environment of the scientist’s time
steps: Study the historical context of Indian science during Bibha Chowdhuri’s time
Identify social barriers faced by women in education
Discuss how these challenges affected her career
Present a short report on how society has changed since then
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand the relationship between society and scientific progress

activities_projects.title: Advanced Vocabulary and Contextual Analysis
activities_projects.objective: Enhance comprehension of academic language and context
steps: Identify complex words and scientific terms from the chapter
Research their meanings and origins
Explain how each word is used within the context of the text
Create sentences using these terms in scientific discussions
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students improve academic vocabulary and contextual language skills

activities_projects.title: Research Presentation on Women in STEM
activities_projects.objective: Encourage in-depth research on global women scientists
steps: Research three influential women scientists from different countries
Analyse their contributions to science
Prepare a presentation connecting their work with Bibha Chowdhuri’s legacy
Present findings to the class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students gain research and presentation skills while learning global scientific history
activities_projects.evaluation: Depth of research and presentation quality (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Scientific Inspiration Poster Campaign
activities_projects.objective: Promote awareness of women’s contributions to science
steps: Design a poster highlighting the importance of women scientists
Include facts about Bibha Chowdhuri and other scientists
Write motivational slogans encouraging girls to pursue science
Display the posters in school corridors
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop creative communication and awareness skills

activities_projects.title: Analytical Speech on Scientific Legacy
activities_projects.objective: Develop advanced speaking and reasoning skills
steps: Prepare a two-minute speech analysing Bibha Chowdhuri’s legacy
Explain how her work influenced future generations of scientists
Support arguments with examples from the chapter
Deliver the speech confidently before the class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students strengthen public speaking and analytical reasoning abilities
activities_projects.evaluation: Content depth, clarity, and delivery (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Reflective Analytical Essay
activities_projects.objective: Encourage critical reflection on scientific inspiration and social progress
steps: Reflect on the life and work of Bibha Chowdhuri
Analyse the barriers she overcame to succeed in science
Discuss how her achievements inspire future scientists
Write a well-structured essay with introduction, analysis, and conclusion
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop higher-level analytical writing and reflection skills
activities_projects.evaluation: Depth of ideas, structure, and language accuracy (10 marks)
